steps.title: Extract the demand claim
steps.content: The passage says that as renewable energy becomes more economically competitive, demand for petroleum falls. That directly links petroleum demand to competition from renewable energy.

steps.title: Reject contradicted claims
steps.content: A invents a predictable annual cycle. C says refining companies are unaffected by demand, but the passage says inventory can become a liability. D reverses the effect by suggesting refiners benefit from declining demand. The renewable-energy relationship is the supported claim. The answer is B.
